base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of effects — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1993 mega man x. Charge-buster + dash-flash + wall-slide dust + explosions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
